title: icacinaceae
intro: The icacinaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. Icacinaceae is a family of plants that is characterized by its diverse range of species, including trees, shrubs, and vines, and is found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. This family is known for its unique and varied adaptations, such as the presence of thorns and the production of toxic compounds. With over 400 species, Icacinaceae is a significant and widespread family of flowering plants.
